round: 7 of the GPU sec10 GEMM-fusion (attention) axis
host: ubu-2 RTX 5070 sm_120 driver=13000 (48 SMs, 0 compute procs at fire = uncontended)
verdict_tier: ORANGE -- INSUFFICIENT (pre-registered <=1.10 NOT hit) + QUANTIFIED-CLOSED-NEGATIVE finding
pre_registered_target: ratio <= 1.10 vs cuBLAS-TC on a shape AND report % of sm_120 FP16 tensor-core roofline

design.applied_swizzle: NONE (SWIZZLE_128B requires .trans path; my mma probe campaign empirically established .trans gives 8x8-block transpose not full transpose -> non-trans + V pre-transpose is the proven correct path)
design.tile: per-CTA BM=64 query rows, BK=64 key block, d=64
design.ptxas_v2: rc=0, 68 regs/thd, 0 spills, 1 barrier, 8 B stack

occupancy_attribution_measured.interpretation: 1 CTA/SM smem-bound (round-4 had 8 CTAs/SM with the BM=16 tile) -- the 64x64 attention tile's resident set (Q + K[2] + V[2] + V^T[2] + S + P + O) is 8x the round-4 footprint

double_buffer_attribution_measured.interpretation: double-buffer provides ZERO benefit at 1 CTA/SM -- the kernel is occupancy-bound not DMA-bound; the TMA overlap opportunity is unrealized because there is no parallel compute to hide loads behind

which_technique_helped_most: NONE moved the wall positively. The transplant REGRESSES vs round-4 because the smem footprint that buys roofline GEMM performance for a standalone GEMM costs occupancy for fused attention. ATTRIBUTED RANK: 64x64 tile (BACKFIRED, the main regressor) > TMA loads (NEUTRAL, save HBM but no occupancy to absorb) > double-buffer (ZERO) > swizzle (NOT APPLIED).
residual_bottleneck: occupancy collapse to 1 CTA/SM from the 99 KB smem footprint required by simultaneous resident Q + K + V + V^T + S + P + O tiles at BM=64
key_discovery_paper_significance_candida: Empirically established (probe2/probe3) that mma.sync.m16n8k16 .trans + ldmatrix performs an 8x8-block transpose not a full 16x16 transpose -- so the P.V GEMM (contraction along V rows) CANNOT use the same trans-B path the QK^T GEMM uses; P.V requires either V pre-transpose in smem OR a fundamentally different addressing scheme. This is a non-obvious empirical fact about the m16n8k16 ldmatrix semantics that doesn't appear in the PTX ISA reference except by careful reading.
paper_reason: ORANGE INSUFFICIENT + closed-negative re-confirmation of a wall (round-4/5 already CLOSED-NEGATIVE via different axes); paper_gate forbids 🟠 and re-confirmation papers per project.tape paper_significance
section10_box: [x] (launch-amort PR #1028) -- NOT touched; GEMM-fusion (attention) axis still NOT-won
next_round_wedge: shallower tile BM=32 or BM=16 + REGISTER-RESIDENT O (acc in regs, not smem) + selective TMA (Q only or interleaved) to restore >=4 CTAs/SM occupancy WITHOUT abandoning TMA

invariants.codegen_untouched: compiler/codegen/*.hexa UNTOUCHED (hand-emit PTX path; .cu/.c are oracle/host only)
invariants.s_tile_never_to_hbm: structural moat preserved (S/P/O resident in smem; only 1 st.global = final O)
invariants.ptxas_clean: sm_120a rc=0, 68 regs/thd, 0 spills, 1 barrier, 8 B stack
